title: Cyclosporiasis news extraction
description: Structured facts extracted from a SINGLE trusted-news article that relays health-department case counts. One instance == one article/snapshot. County figures are stored as data; article prose is never reproduced.

outlet_tier.description: Trust tier from the domain allowlist. A = public media / established daily / HD-quoting local TV. Set by the harvester, not the model.

timezone.description: IANA tz of the outlet, e.g. 'America/Kentucky/Louisville'. Used to resolve relative dates.

state_context.description: USPS abbreviation of the state the article is primarily about, e.g. 'KY'.

figures.description: Every case figure stated in the article. Do NOT invent geographies that are not named.

geography_name.description: County name WITHOUT the word 'County' (e.g. 'Jefferson'), or the state name for state-level rows.

count_is_approximate.description: true when phrased as 'more than', 'nearly', 'about', 'fewer than'.

count_type.description: 'reported' = confirmed+probable combined when the article gives a single larger figure.

as_of_date.description: Absolute date the figure is current through, resolved from relative phrasing using article.published_time + article.timezone. null ONLY if unresolvable.

as_of_date_verbatim.description: The exact phrase used, e.g. 'as of Wednesday evening'. For audit.

origin_agency.description: The body the figure is attributed to, e.g. 'KDPH'. The outlet is the relay, not the origin.

coverage.description: complete_list = an explicit full county roster; partial_list = only some counties named (e.g. 'led by X, Y, Z'); single = one geography. Downstream NEVER imputes zeros for unnamed counties.

source_char_span.description: [start, end) offsets into the cleaned article text supporting this figure.
